notes: All nine responses are well-structured tables that get the 11-class skeleton largely right; the dominant error pattern is falsely appending 'with the Embassy of India' to the Wed/Thu Yoga entries (which actually carry no such annotation) — present in 7 of 9 responses. The recurring 'TAJI' vs 'TAIJI' spelling slip appears in 6 of 9, and the 'with Gabi' instructor detail is captured only twice (t0.1|rep1, t0.7|rep2). The single dropped-class failure (t0.4|rep1 omits both OSTEOPOROSIS and Tuesday Taiji) is the clear outlier. The t0.4|rep0 '(Fitness)' category tags are the only invented-content pattern beyond the Embassy annotations. None of the responses mention the color-coding (blue/orange/green), icons, footer URL, or VIC Health Club branding.
